title: Elliott Polypropylene Rope Clothes Line 20 Metres, Extra Strong, Weather and Rust resistant Washing Line. Laundry Essential for outdoor use, laundry rooms and camping, Green
features: DURABLE MATERIAL - The clothes line is made from high-quality polypropylene, which is a durable and strong material that can withstand the elements and last for a long time
GENEROUS LENGTH - The clothes line measures 20 Metres in length, providing ample space to hang a large number of clothes at once
ENERGY - Save energy by naturally line-drying clothes. This also protects the life of your clothes by reducing chances of shrinkage from tumble drying
EASY TO USE - The clothes line is lightweight and easy to handle, making it simple to set up and take down as needed.
ELLIOTTS QUALITY - Elliott's has been providing high-quality household products for over 70 years, so you can trust that this clothes line is made to last and will meet your needs
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
